mapper.select: SELECT cc.id, cc.chapter_name AS chapterName, cc.chapter_type AS chapterType, cc.description, cc.parent_id AS parentId, cc.sort_order AS sortOrder, cc.create_time AS createTime, cc.update_time AS updateTime, 0 AS resourceCount FROM course_chapter cc WHERE cc.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY cc.sort_order ASC, cc.id ASC

SELECT cc.id, cc.chapter_name AS chapterName, cc.chapter_type AS chapterType, cc.description, cc.parent_id AS parentId, cc.sort_order AS sortOrder, cc.create_time AS createTime, cc.update_time AS updateTime, 0 AS resourceCount FROM course_chapter cc WHERE cc.class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY cc.parent_id ASC, cc.sort_order ASC, cc.id ASC
